videoSnippet.title: No One is Above The Endgame || Pragg vs Alireza || Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Praggnanandhaa R (2690) - Firouzja, Alireza (2748)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.07.02
B23 Sicilian, closed, 2...Nc6

1.e4 c5 2.Nc3 Nc6 3.Bb5 Nd4 4.a4 g6 5.Nf3 Bg7 6.O-O e6 7.Nxd4 cxd4 8.Ne2 Ne7 9.d3 O-O 10.a5 d5 11.exd5 Nxd5 12.Bd2 e5 13.c4 dxc3 14.Nxc3 Be6 15.Bc4 Nxc3 16.Bxc3 Bxc4 17.dxc4 Qxd1 18.Rfxd1 Rfd8 19.f3 f6 20.Kf1 Bf8 21.a6 b6 22.Ke2 Kf7 23.Rd3 Rxd3 24.Kxd3 Ke6 25.b4 Rc8 26.Re1 Bd6 27.g4 Rc7 28.f4 h5 29.fxe5 fxe5 30.gxh5 gxh5 31.Re3 Kf5 32.Bd2 Rd7 33.Rf3+ Ke6 34.Ke4 Rc7 35.c5 bxc5 36.b5 c4 37.Rg3 Bc5 38.Rg6+ Kf7 39.Rh6 Rc8 40.Kxe5 Rb8 41.Rh7+ Kg6 42.Rb7 Rd8 43.Ba5 Rd3 44.Rc7 Bd6+ 45.Ke4 Bxc7 46.Bxc7 Rb3 47.b6 axb6 48.a7 Ra3 49.Bxb6 Kf6 50.Kd4 c3 51.Bc5 Rxa7 52.Kxc3 Rd7 53.h4 Kf5 54.Be3 Ke4 55.Bg5 Rd5 56.Kc2 Ke5 57.Kc3 Ke6 58.Be3 Kf6 59.Bg5+ Kg6 60.Be3 Kf5 61.Bg5 Ke4 62.Kc2 Rd3 63.Bf6 Ke3 64.Be7 Kd4 65.Bf6+ Kc4 66.Bg5 Rd4 67.Bf6 Rd5 68.Bg5 Kc5 69.Kc3 Kd6 70.Bf4+ Ke6 71.Be3 Kf5 72.Bg5 Kg4 73.Kc2 Kf3 74.Kc3 Kg3 75.Kc2 Rd4 76.Kc3 Rxh4 77.Bxh4+ Kxh4 78.Kd2 Kg3 79.Ke2 Kg2
